chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1486 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 7119/2024 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 7120/2024 4. For hearing of main case 29.10.2024 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Siddiqui Advocate for Petitioners. ----- 1. Granted. 2to4. The Petition is about appointment of Petitioner against Deceased Quota in place of his father Late Kabeer Khan, by invoking Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974, which, inter alia, has been declared as ultra vires by the Honourable Supreme Court in its authoritative pronouncement handed down in the Case of General Post Office, Islamabad & others v. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No. 3390 of 2021). In view of the above, this Petition is dismissed with all pending Applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
